texto: The only reason you say that race was not an issue is because you wish it was not. We all wish it was not. But it’s a lie. I came from a country where race was not an issue
autor: I did not think of myself as black and I only became black when I came to America.
explicacao: Citação de I did not think of myself as black and I only became black when I came to America. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The only reason you say that race was not an issue is because you wish it was not. We all wish it…” articula reflexao, chimamanda-ngozi-adichie, americanah em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como americanah.
